narration: Efficacy measures how well a vaccine works in controlled trials. Effectiveness? That's real-world performance.

narration: Imagine a vaccine showing 95% efficacy in trials. But what about in everyday life? It may drop due to factors like behavior or virus variants.

narration: Studies show that effectiveness can vary widely. For example, flu vaccines might be only 40% effective in a bad year.
